## What changed

Describe the change and its effect on civilization authors.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes
- [ ] Generated XML and `.modinfo` were parsed when applicable
- [ ] DDS contracts were validated when applicable
- [ ] No credentials, personal paths, game assets, or unauthorized mod files were added
- [ ] BNW/IGE runtime testing is reported accurately or marked not run

## Files and provenance

List changed files and identify any third-party source, license, or permission.
